mapper.select: SELECT id id, warehouse_no warehouseNo, org_no orgNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, barcode barcode, status_code statusCode, stock_rate stockRate, stock_keep stockKeep, qty qty, unit_no unitNo, reference_qty referenceQty, chag_type chagType, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, item_name itemName FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id id, warehouse_no warehouseNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, barcode barcode, status_code statusCode, stock_rate stockRate, stock_keep stockKeep, qty qty, unit_no unitNo, reference_qty referenceQty, chag_type chagType, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, item_name itemName, lot_att01 lotAtt01 FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType} AND create_by = #{createBy}

SELECT id, warehouse_no warehouseNo, ISNULL(cell_no,'') cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode , qty , unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, create_date createDate, org_no orgNo, lot_att01 lotAtt01, lot_att02 lotAtt02, lot_att03 lotAtt03, lot_att04 lotAtt04, lot_att05 lotAtt05, classify_type classifyType, remark remark FROM inv_barcode_operation where id in
#{id}

SELECT id id, org_no orgNo, doc_no docNo, doc_seq_no docSeqNo, warehouse_no warehouseNo, org_no orgNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, barcode barcode, status_code statusCode, stock_rate stockRate, stock_keep stockKeep, qty qty, unit_no unitNo, reference_qty referenceQty, chag_type chagType, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, create_by createBy, item_name itemName FROM inv_barcode_operation
id IN
#{id}
-- 当 ids 为空时，添加一个恒假条件避免语法错误（可根据业务调整） 1 = 0
